SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO IAN MAC LACHLAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-06-2009 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATERFRONT RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUSINESS TEAM $4,588.33 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,748.33, THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT, IAN MACLACHLAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
